password.weak: Password must contain at least 8 characters, one uppercase, one lowercase, one number and one special character
password.minLength: Password must be at least {min} characters

string.minLength: This field must be at least {min} characters
string.maxLength: This field must not exceed {max} characters

number.min: Value must be greater than or equal to {min}
number.max: Value must be less than or equal to {max}

slug.invalid: Slug must contain only lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens

array.minSize: Array must contain at least {min} element(s)
array.maxSize: Array must not contain more than {max} element(s)
